hero.desc_1: Providing complete hardware and smart management software packages. Exclusive AI shaping integration helps you completely differentiate from the market and bring
hero.desc_2: "Developed by top-tier software engineers working domestically and internationally, with deep experience in AI applications, promising to meet all your customization needs."

commitment.p1: When we take on a project, VibeBooth treats it as a true labor of love. We don't hand you a pile of lifeless parts - we deliver a smoothly running money-making machine.
commitment.quote: From paper ideas to detailed technical drawings, we always plan precisely and follow the construction schedule up to the grand opening.

points.title: In-depth Survey & Consultation
points.desc: Not only selling hardware, we study your space and target customers to advise the most ROI-optimised concept.

points.title: Detailed Proposal & 3D Demo
points.desc: All patterns, materials and overall dimensions are transparent on detailed technical drawings before finalizing construction.

points.title: Clear Timeline & Continuous Reports
points.desc: We stick to hardware construction and software tuning plans. Daily/weekly updates keep you in control of the launch schedule.

points.title: Acceptance Support & Handover
points.desc: On-site handover and direct staff training on smooth machine operation, replacing print rolls and basic troubleshooting.

commitment.image_alt: Detailed technical drawing and 3D photobooth demo by VibeBooth

conceptGallery.header_desc: With modular block designs, VibeBooth easily adapts to your existing interior concept - from gentle Korea Style to edgy Cyberpunk.

concepts.title: Eco-Green Booth
concepts.desc: Minimal aluminum frame combined with natural vines, turning the machine into a tasteful decor piece ideal for garden cafes or healing-style studios.

concepts.title: Urban Garden White
concepts.desc: Pure white design with olive-green drapes, creating an elegant focal point in bright, plant-filled spaces.

concepts.title: Skyview Villa Booth
concepts.desc: Slim aluminum frame with luxurious red velvet curtains, perfect for panorama-view villas or premium lobbies.

coreFeatures.desc: Continuously updated proprietary software that delivers superior AI power and an experience competitors can't copy.

features.title: Full Automation
features.desc: From countdown to printing and QR/Email delivery - fully automated.

features.title: Customizable UI
features.desc: Supports UI customization per business needs (one free update/change in the first year).

features.title: Advanced Video FX
features.desc: Auto add slow motion, fast motion, and reverse for compelling videos.

features.title: Flexible Layout Design
features.desc: Combine 1, 2, or 4 layouts into print formats with one-touch Template Editor.

features.title: Digital Green Screen
features.desc: AI auto-background removal for seamless travel or ocean backdrops at the Booth.

features.title: Multimedia Support
features.desc: Photo, GIF, Boomerang and short videos with built-in premium filters.

features.title: Auto QR Payment
features.desc: Displays QR codes for online payment or quick cash collection.

features.title: Signature Drawing
features.desc: Customers can sign or draw on the touchscreen to personalize photos.

features.title: Flexible Feature Support
features.desc: Feel free to implement any creative features or mechanics you come up with.

pricing.why_title: Why VibeBooth pricing gives you confidence?

why.title: Own the Core Tech

why.title: AI Personalization
why.desc: Transform characters, customize presets at the Booth - features cheap machines can't do.

why.title: Hands-on Support
